news.headline: BlackRock suggests slightly favoring US stocks in portfolios amidst global uncertainty.

news.summary: The AM-001 Study marks a significant achievement for Galmed as they move towards Aramchol Meglumine, an enhanced version of their primary compound currently in advanced clinical stages. Aramchol Meglumine, a New Chemical Entity safeguarded by patents until 2035, is undergoing development for multiple purposes.
news.headline: Galmed reports positive Part 1 results from AM-001 study on Aramchol Meglumine, with NCE protected until 2035.

news.summary: Dr. Nancy Messier and Dr. Thierry Abribat have recently become part of Find Therapeutics to aid in its mission and expansion. The biopharmaceutical company based in MONTRÉAL, made this announcement on April 10, 2025. Find Therapeutics Inc. focuses on creating cutting-edge treatments for autoimmune disorders.
news.headline: Find Therapeutics adds 2 new directors, Dr. Nancy Messier and Dr. Thierry Abribat, for growth and mission support.

news.summary: In Irvine, California, on April 10, 2025, Qnovia, Inc. announced key appointments to its leadership team. Mario Danek has been named President and CEO, while James Watson has joined as the COO. Francesca Lanuza will serve as the Director of Regulatory Affairs, and Dr. Robert West has been appointed as the Chairman of the Scientific Advisory Board. These strategic appointments mark significant changes within the company as it navigates the pharmaceutical and medtech industries.
news.headline: Qnovia, Inc. announces leadership transition. Mario Danek appointed President and CEO. James Watson new COO. Dr. Robert West named Chairman. Francesca Lanuza appointed Director of Regulatory Affairs. #leadershiptransition #Qnovia #appointments

news.summary: In Belgrade, Montana on April 10, 2025, Bridger Aerospace Group Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: BAER, BAERW) revealed that it has secured an exclusive-use contract from the State of Montana after a competitive bidding process. The contract entails utilizing a customized Daher Kodiak 100 aircraft for wildfire detection and mapping. Initially set for one year, the agreement includes the possibility of two extension years subject to state funding. The contract guarantees a minimum of 120 days of availability per year, amounting to a base annual worth of $648,000, with potential for additional days and flight hours beyond the base value.
news.headline: Bridger Aerospace awarded exclusive-use contract by State of Montana for wildfire detection aircraft, worth minimum $648,000/year.

news.summary: Ochsner has shown continued support for the advancement of SRP-001 as a top contender in the growing non-opioid treatment field with a follow-on investment. This investment reaffirms their commitment to South Rampart Pharma, Inc. (referred to as "South Rampart" or the "Company"), a clinical-stage biotechnology firm. The announcement was made on April 10, 2025, in New Orleans.
news.headline: South Rampart Pharma appoints Ochsner Health CEO Pete November to board; Ochsner commits to advancing SRP-001 in non-opioid space.

news.summary: On April 10, 2025, NeOnc Technologies Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: NTHI), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in treatments for central nervous system (CNS) cancers and disorders, disclosed that Amir Heshmatpour, the Executive Chairman, has been named as the President of the company. Heshmatpour will continue as the Executive Chairman and will also undertake the duties of the President to drive the Company's strategic and clinical efforts forward.
news.headline: NeOnc Technologies Holdings, Inc. appoints Amir Heshmatpour as President in addition to his role as Executive Chairman, to drive growth.

news.summary: The SAFE platform, based in Palo Alto, California, has seen a surge in popularity within the insurance sector as the preferred method for streamlined and transparent cyber risk management during underwriting processes. This platform allows insurance brokers and carriers to enhance risk selection efficiently. The technology is quickly becoming the standard, offering a more effective and clear approach to cyber risk management in the industry.
news.headline: SAFE platform revolutionizing cyber risk management in insurance industry, 4 wins at Cyber Insurance Awards.

news.summary: A team of employee owners in Sheboygan has successfully doubled capacity to fulfill local demand for electrical, plumbing, and HVAC services. The grand opening of their new facility at 4212 High Tech Lane in Sheboygan, Wisconsin occurred on April 10, 2025. This expansion signifies a significant milestone, allowing the team to better serve the community by increasing its capabilities.
news.headline: DSG opens new facility in Sheboygan, WI doubling capacity to serve local demand in electrical, plumbing, HVAC.

news.summary: Wyld Works has recently unveiled their 2024 Impact Report, which showcases their dedication to social and environmental causes. This release comes from Portland, Oregon on April 10, 2025. As a prominent player in the cannabis edibles market, Wyld is focused on enhancing their Corporate Social Responsibility efforts. The report presents a detailed overview of the company's initiatives, emphasizing their commitment towards making a positive impact.
news.headline: Wyld introduces Wyld Works, a justice-focused program redefining enterprise and activism, releasing 2024 Impact Report.

news.summary: Howmet Aerospace, headquartered in Pittsburgh, has announced plans to host a webcast to disclose its first-quarter financial results for the year 2025. The company is set to provide important figures and insights during the webcast. This event will offer stakeholders and investors an opportunity to gain valuable information about the company's performance and outlook moving forward. The webcast is expected to attract a wide audience interested in Howmet Aerospace's financial standing and strategic direction.
news.headline: Howmet Aerospace in Pittsburgh plans to announce its Q1 2025 results via webcast.

news.summary: Renowned CPA Bruce A. Phillips, a strong advocate for cloud technology and a prominent figure in accounting technology, has recently been added to the Advisory Board of Trez.co, the first U.S. Latino tech payroll startup. The announcement was made by Trez, based in San Francisco, on April 10, 2025. This move signifies a key development for the growing company as it continues to establish itself within the industry.
news.headline: U.S. Latino Tech Startup Trez.co adds Cloud Accounting Pioneer Bruce A. Phillips to Advisory Board.

news.summary: Singapore-based CURRENC Group Inc. (Nasdaq: CURR), a leading fintech company providing AI solutions to financial institutions globally, announced on April 10, 2025, that Nasdaq has confirmed its compliance with the minimum market value of publicly held shares requirement. The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC (“Nasdaq”) informed CURRENC that for the last ten consecutive business days, its ordinary shares maintained a market value of publicly held shares (“MVPHS”) exceeding $5,000,000. This figure aligns with Nasdaq Global Market’s Listing Rule 5450(b)(1)(C), ensuring CURRENC's continued listing. Nasdaq has closed the matter, confirming CURRENC's adherence to the Rule.
news.headline: CURRENC Group Inc. regains Nasdaq compliance with $5,000,000 market value requirement after ten days, according to recent announcement.

news.summary: Eric Purcell, a partner-sales expert with a strong global go-to-market strategy background, has joined Semperis as Senior Vice President. The announcement was made on April 10, 2025, in Hoboken, New Jersey. Semperis specializes in AI-powered identity security and cyber resilience. This addition is expected to enhance the company's market presence and bolster its sales team.
news.headline: Semperis names Eric Purcell as Senior VP of Global Partner Sales and Alliances. Expertise in go-to-market strategy.

news.summary: VitalHub Corp. has recently disclosed the details of its planned acquisition of Induction Healthcare Group PLC. The agreement involves a recommended cash acquisition in which VitalHub will purchase all existing and future shares of Induction. The acquisition will be carried out through a court-sanctioned scheme of arrangement under Part 26 of the Companies Act 2006. As per the terms of the deal, each shareholder of Induction will receive £0.10 in cash for every share they own. This offer values Induction at around £9.7 million.
news.headline: VitalHub to acquire Induction Healthcare Group for £9.7 million in cash, shareholders to receive £0.10 per share.

news.summary: Alaska Airlines is providing festival attendees with a unique opportunity to unwind and recharge by offering festival upgrades and travel-related prizes. The airline, based in Seattle, announced on April 10, 2025 that it is amplifying its presence during the festival season as the designated airline for Coachella.
news.headline: Alaska Airlines offers Mileage Plan members a chance to win festival upgrades and prizes at Coachella and Stagecoach.

news.summary: Eon has developed a technology that enables customers to convert cloud backups into data lakes, facilitating the rapid implementation of AI strategies and smooth transitions to Google Cloud. The platform, based in New York, announced this advancement on April 10, 2025. With Eon's solution, businesses can enhance their capabilities and data storage efficiency, ultimately boosting their competitiveness in the market.
news.headline: Eon partners with Google Cloud to accelerate AI adoption, transform cloud backups into data lakes, and enable safer migration.

news.summary: Soluna Holdings, Inc., a leading developer of eco-friendly data centers for high-performance computing tasks like Bitcoin mining and AI, has recently released updates regarding its March 2025 project site operations. The company, listed on NASDAQ as SLNH, shared notable corporate and site-specific news. For detailed monthly performance metrics, interested parties can access the information on their website. In addition, Soluna provided insights into its 2024 Annual and Q4 Results, accompanied by other significant business-related announcements.
news.headline: Soluna Holdings gives March 2025 updates on green data centers, Bitcoin mining, AI, with financial results for 2024.

news.summary: In an effort to enhance its clinical development efforts for novel therapies targeting obesity and related cardiometabolic diseases, a company has elected David Grainger, Ph.D., as Chairman of Development and Meg Fitzgerald, J.D., as Chief Legal Officer. The strategic expansion is set to bolster Rivus's portfolio. The company, based in Charlottesville, Virginia, is taking significant steps towards advancing treatment options for these prevalent health conditions.
news.headline: Rivus Pharma hires new leaders, opens SF office prior to Phase 2 results in MASH. David Grainger, Ph.D., as Chairman of Development and Meg Fitzgerald, J.D., Chief Legal Officer appointed. Focus on obesity & cardiometabolic diseases.

news.summary: In Cambridge, Massachusetts on April 10, 2025, Nona Biosciences, an international biotech firm, revealed its partnership with another entity for research purposes. The company offers comprehensive services, encompassing target validation, antibody discovery, and preclinical research, under the "Idea to IND" framework.
news.headline: Nona Biosciences and Atossa Therapeutics partner on next-gen antibody therapies for breast cancer.

news.summary: In Toronto, Bragg Gaming Group (NASDAQ: BRAG, TSX: BRAG), a top global B2B iGaming content and technology provider, revealed the purchase of a significant equity stake and an exclusive content partnership agreement with RAPIDPLAY LTD, a specialized Brazilian game development studio. RapidPlay is recognized for its localized, high-quality online casino content designed for the Brazilian and Latin American market. The partnership will grant Bragg access to RapidPlay's unique games tailored to these markets.
news.headline: Bragg Gaming invests in Brazilian studio RapidPlay, specializing in localized online casino games for Latin America.

news.summary: In the year 2027, it is projected that capital intensity will increase to 14%, as reported in a recent study by Dell'Oro Group. The report, which provides market insights on telecommunications, security, networks, and data centers, indicates a significant growth trend. This data was disclosed in Redwood City, California, on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Telecom capex to decline 2% CAGR worldwide, with capital intensity expected to reach 14% by 2027 - Dell'Oro Group.

news.summary: In Seattle, the housing market is facing challenges amidst a swiftly changing economic environment, influenced by President Trump’s tariff measures, a volatile stock market, and higher prospects of a recession. A recent report from Redfin (NASDAQ: RDFN), a tech-based real estate brokerage, indicates significant financial uncertainty for both potential homebuyers and sellers. The market saw an uptick in homebuying interest in early April, as mortgage-purchase applications rose.
news.headline: Homebuyer demand improved, but economic uncertainties may affect sales. Tariff policies, rates, and recession fears at play.

news.summary: Lightspeed Commerce Inc., a leading commerce platform traded on both NYSE under the symbol LSPD and TSX under the same symbol, has disclosed its plan to release the financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. The company, headquartered in Montreal, specializes in offering merchants a comprehensive omnichannel experience. This announcement was made on April 10, 2025.
news.headline: Lightspeed Commerce Inc. to announce fiscal Q4 & full year 2025 results in conference call. NYSE: LSPD | TSX: LSPD.

news.summary: In Dallas, the top event parking technology provider in North America, ParkHub, has unveiled a new name as JustPark after merging with a UK parking platform in April 2024. The rebranding aims to maintain its industry-leading status by revolutionizing event parking. JustPark is presently driving $1 billion in booking volume for 500+ B2B clients in the U.S. and changing parking habits in the UK with its app utilized by over 14 million drivers. The move is set to enhance customer experience and service offerings as the company continues to expand and innovate under the guidance of Jeff Sh.
news.headline: ParkHub rebrands as JustPark post merger, powers $1bn in bookings for 500+ B2B clients in US & helps 14M drivers in UK.

news.summary: A conference call is scheduled to take place on April 10, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time in REHOVOT, Israel. Nova, identified as NVMI on NASDAQ, a prominent leader and supplier of cutting-edge metrology and process control solutions utilized in semiconductor production, disclosed today that...
news.headline: Nova will report first quarter 2025 financial results on May 8, with a conference call at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. ($NVMI)

news.summary: A contract has been granted to Armaments Research Company (ARC), Inc. by Montana State University in collaboration with the U.S. Army Program Executive Office (PEO) Soldier. The contract aims to design an AI-powered sensor for the M249 Squad Automatic Weapon (SAW). This aligns with PEO Soldier’s goal of enhancing military capabilities with advanced technology. ARC, Inc. is known for its expertise in defense technology solutions. This initiative underscores the focus on upgrading equipment to bolster the effectiveness of warfighters.
news.headline: ARC has won a MILTECH award contract to enhance M249 with an AI weapon sensor, in collaboration with PEO Soldier.

news.summary: In San Francisco, a recent announcement revealed that Dr. Emily Corse has been appointed as the Executive Vice President of Therapeutics at Noetik. This move aims to expedite the development of the company's AI-powered therapeutics pipeline.
news.headline: Dr. Emily Corse named EVP at Noetik to boost AI-powered therapeutics pipeline in San Francisco.

news.summary: Elanco Animal Health Incorporated, a publicly traded company listed under the ticker symbol ELAN on the New York Stock Exchange, is set to release its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Wednesday, May 7, 2025. Alongside this announcement, Elanco will host a conference call for investors and media to discuss the results and provide insights. The conference call is an opportunity for the investment community and media representatives to engage directly with Elanco's management team and gain a deeper understanding of the company's financial standing and strategic direction.
news.headline: Elanco will announce Q1 financial results on May 7, 2025, with a conference call for investors and media.

news.summary: A recent event, Mobis Mobility Day, was hosted by Hyundai Mobis in Detroit with a focus on their business vision and investment standing as part of "Mobis in Global." During the event, discussions were centered around exploring collaboration and business prospects in Detroit, a city known for being the base of three major automakers and now being identified as a significant center for the automotive industry. Hyundai Mobis used this platform to unveil their current investment status and highlight their plans for future collaborations within the region. Detroit's growing prominence in the automotive sector has positioned it as a key strategic location for companies like Hyundai Mobis to cultivate partnerships and expand their business ventures.
news.headline: Hyundai Mobis introduces vision in Detroit, seeking collaboration with local businesses in city known for automakers.

news.summary: In San Francisco, a recent report by At-Bay has revealed that remote access tools were responsible for 80% of ransomware attacks in 2024. Additionally, cyber claims driven by supply chain vulnerabilities have surged by 43%. The data highlights the increasing threat posed by remote access vulnerabilities and supply chain weaknesses in the cybersecurity landscape.
news.headline: 4 out of 5 ransomware attacks in 2024 were caused by remote access tools, with a 43% increase in cyber claims.

news.summary: The Chairman and CEO of Ramaco Resources, Inc. (NASDAQ: METC), Randall Atkins, will be interviewed by Stuart Varney on Fox Business Channel on Thursday, April 10, 2025. The interview is set to air at around 11:25am ET.
news.headline: Ramaco Resources' Chairman and CEO Randall Atkins to appear on Fox Business Channel on April 10 at 11:25am ET. Nasdaq: METC.

news.summary: A global provider of AI-first enterprise software, Aptean, and supply chain management leader, Logility, have joined forces to offer a comprehensive supply chain solution. This collaboration aims to provide customers with cutting-edge capabilities for an end-to-end supply chain management experience. The innovative partnership is poised to revolutionize the industry, delivering significant value to customers. This strategic alliance is set to redefine supply chain management with advanced technologies and unparalleled expertise.
news.headline: Aptean acquires Logility to enhance supply chain management, offering end-to-end planning experience.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, the Indigenomics Institute, H.R. MacMillan Space Centre, and MOVE37XR have signed a Memorandum of Understanding to advance the inaugural LIFE AT THE CENTER Festival. This Indigenous-led platform aims to integrate economy, ecology, culture, and technology while celebrating Indigenous resilience. The MOU signifies a joint dedication to enhancing Indigenous economic visibility and self-determination through storytelling.
news.headline: Partnership announced between Indigenomics Institute, H.R. MacMillan Space Centre, and MOVE37XR to advance LIFE AT THE CENTER Festival in Vancouver, promoting Indigenous economic visibility and self-determination.

news.summary: In Lenexa, Kansas on April 10, 2025, ELIAS Animal Health, a prominent player in cancer immunotherapies for animals, revealed that Dr. Philip J. Bergman, a recognized expert with a DVM, PhD, and DACVIM (Oncology) qualifications, has become a part of its Scientific Advisory Board. This addition strengthens their board with Dr. Bergman's vast experience in the field.
news.headline: Dr. Philip J. Bergman joins ELIAS Animal Health's Scientific Advisory Board, boosting cancer immunotherapy research.

news.summary: Signios Biosciences, a biotechnology company based in Foster City, California, previously known as the US research branch of MedGenome Inc., unveiled its rebranding initiative. The company is a leader in multiomics and AI-driven bioinformatics. This shift signifies a new chapter for Signios Bio in the US market, emphasizing its commitment to collaborating with researchers to expedite precision medicine and drug development. This rebranding aims to align the company's identity with its vision for the future.
news.headline: Signios Bio rebrands from MedGenome Inc, focusing on AI-driven bioinformatics for precision medicine.

news.summary: In New York, the current shopping landscape has become increasingly daunting. With the looming threat of tariffs, both consumers and brands are facing uncertainties, leading to a heightened emphasis on deriving maximum value from their interactions. Attentive®, a prominent figure in AI-driven mobile marketing, has recently published its 2025 Consumer Trends Report titled "The State of Personalized Marketing." This report sheds light on crucial aspects of consumer behavior and their evolving expectations from brands in the forthcoming year. The findings indicate that a significant 81% of consumers tend to disregard
news.headline: Global study shows 81% ignore irrelevant marketing messages; personalization drives loyalty and sales. Attentive's report delves into consumer trends.

news.summary: Suralink, a client collaboration platform for professional services firms based in Salt Lake City, has been recognized with two awards for its exceptional dedication to customer satisfaction. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to providing top-notch service to its clients.
news.headline: Suralink wins 2 awards for client excellence in Salt Lake City. Leading platform for professional services.

news.summary: In Carlsbad, California on April 10, 2025, the NAMM board of directors announced the appointment of the 2025 officers to lead the executive committee. The ExCom members will serve until April 2026, advocating for NAMM's worldwide membership and the music sector.
news.headline: NAMM names new executive committee officers for 2025-2026 term, representing music industry and global membership.

news.summary: Ooma, Inc., based in Sunnyvale, California, a leading provider of advanced communication solutions for both businesses and consumers, revealed that its Ooma Office phone service has been honored with PCMag's esteemed Business Choice Award for Overall VoIP Service. Ooma further secured victories in the categories of IT-Managed VoIP Service and VoIP Service for Home Offices. This recognition, based on PCMag's annual Business Choice survey, showcases Ooma's excellence in the realm of VoIP services. More information can be found at the following link: [link to the award article].
news.headline: Ooma Office wins PCMag's 2025 Business Choice Award for VoIP Service in multiple categories. Read more:https://www.pcmag.com/articles/business-choice-2025-the-top-voip-provider-according-to-our-readers

news.summary: Aston Villa FC has unveiled a long-term partnership with Legends, a worldwide premium experiences firm, to aid in the club's advancement as it redevelops and upgrades Villa Park into a top-tier sports and entertainment destination. The collaboration with Legends, known for providing outstanding fan experiences and increasing commercial income, is in line with Aston Villa's strategic goal of establishing the premier supporter experience in English football. This deal marks a significant step in the club's journey towards enhancing its offerings, with aims to delight fans and boost revenue streams.
news.headline: Aston Villa FC partners with Legends for long-term growth, enhancing Villa Park as a sports and entertainment venue.

news.summary: In Boston, OneSpan Inc. (NASDAQ: OSPN) will share its Q1 2025 financial results on May 1, 2025, post-market closing. A conference call is scheduled for 4:30 p.m. ET that day to delve into the findings. Interested parties can access a live webcast on OneSpan's investor relations site at investors.onespan.com during the call.
news.headline: OneSpan Inc. (NASDAQ: OSPN) will release Q1 financial results on May 1, 2025, with a conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET.

news.summary: In the latest 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Transportation Management Systems, Oracle has been recognized as a Leader, standing out for its exceptional Ability to Execute and far-reaching Completeness of Vision. This recognition highlights Oracle's strong position in the industry. The report was published on April 10, 2025, and emphasizes Oracle Fusion Cloud's performance in this sector. Oracle's leadership in this quadrant underscores its importance in the transportation management systems market, reaffirming the company's position as a top player in the industry. The high ranking reflects Oracle's dedication to providing innovative solutions and quality services in this sector.
news.headline: Oracle named Leader in Gartner Magic Quadrant for Transportation Management Systems 18th time. Highest for Ability to Execute, furthest for Completeness of Vision.

news.summary: The appointment of Arun Kumar Ramchandran, also known as Rak, as the new Chief Executive Officer has been announced by QBurst, a company based in Fairfax, Virginia, and Palo Alto, California.
news.headline: QBurst appoints Arun Kumar Ramchandran as new CEO.

news.summary: QAD Inc., a prominent provider of cloud-based manufacturing and supply chain solutions, announced the recipients of its 2025 LEAP Awards during Teamwork, its global event for partners, hosted in Athens, Greece. The prestigious awards highlight partners in the QAD community who have played a pivotal role in the success of QAD customers. The event celebrated the remarkable achievements of partners who have significantly contributed to the company's success.
news.headline: QAD reveals 2025 LEAP Award winners at Teamwork event in Athens, celebrating partners' success in QAD community.

news.summary: In Toronto, StackAdapt, a prominent multi-channel advertising platform, has collaborated with Lyft Media to introduce programmatic in-app advertising on the Lyft app. By partnering with Kevel, a top API-based media ad serving technology provider, this venture allows StackAdapt clients to reach Lyft's premium US in-app ad inventory. This partnership offers brands, agencies, and merchants a distinctive chance to engage with millions of Lyft users.
news.headline: Lyft and StackAdapt partner for programmatic in-app advertising in Lyft app via strategic Kevel collaboration. Millions reached.

news.summary: Support, Inc. is expanding its reach in Colorado by opening new locations that will not only provide support for individuals with intellectual and developmental disabilities but also contribute to the local economy. This network, known for its community-based services, is set to create employment opportunities in the state. The new locations are expected to boost job creation significantly, with an estimated number of jobs. The move is aimed to enhance support services for those in need while fostering growth and development within Colorado communities.
news.headline: Support, Inc. Network expands statewide to aid more with disabilities, creating jobs in CO communities. (Characters: 91)

news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Evolv Technologies Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVLV) revealed an upgraded collaboration with the San Francisco Giants, establishing Evolv as a Proud Partner of the team. The deal involves transitioning the Giants' current 20 Evolv Express security systems to the newer Gen2 units, which provide improved mobility and security features. Evolv specializes in AI-driven solutions aimed at enhancing safety measures, offering innovative technology for creating secure environments.
news.headline: San Francisco Giants partner with Evolv for 2025 season with 20 Gen2 security systems replacing existing ones.

news.summary: A conference in Austin, Texas, happening on April 10, 2025, will showcase over 40 presentations by healthcare, nonprofit, and government leaders. Findhelp, a company specializing in closed-loop referral management software for enhancing the social safety net, revealed the opening of registration for the event.
news.headline: Registration open for 2025 Connect Summit in Austin presented by Findhelp, with 40+ presentations from healthcare, nonprofits, and government leaders.

news.summary: Over the past decade, the adoption of smart home devices in the United States has surged dramatically, increasing five times to reach 45% of households with internet access. However, only 25% of these households utilize a router or gateway app provided by their Internet Service Provider or router manufacturer. This data comes from a report by Parks Associates, a prominent market research firm.
news.headline: Smart home device adoption in US internet households increased to 45%; only 25% use router/gateway app. - Parks Associates at Wi-Fi World Congress.
